since_last: 70% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.96%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.40% · BTC -3.00% · Gold +1.12% · Nasdaq100 +1.18%. 70% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.96%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.96%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.68%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.68%, AMBA +8.67%, VRT +7.98%, AMD +7.24%, ARM +7.10%. Laggards: AVAV -4.02%, WDAY -3.21%, RXRX -2.27%, TTD -1.94%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.44% at $165.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
